scriptorium = {
	is_foreign = no
	pop_type = clergy
	max_levels = guild_max_level
	
	category = consumer_goods_category
	
	employment_size = religious_building_employment

	
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes
	
	

	build_time = guild_build_time
	
	unique_production_methods = {
		scriptorium_maintenance = {
			dyes = 0.05
			paper = 0.2
			lumber = 0.1
			produced = books
			output = 0.315

		
			category = guild_input
		}
	}

	construction_demand = guild_construction

}

	is_foreign = no
	pop_type = burghers
	max_levels = workshop_max_level
	
	category = consumer_goods_category
	
	employment_size = workshop_employment
	
	
	town = yes

	megalopolis = yes

	

	obsolete = scriptorium

	build_time = workshop_build_time
	
	unique_production_methods = {

			lead = 0.2 #Types
			paper = 0.7
			tools = 0.025
			lumber = 0.25

			output = 1.05

	}

}
